global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on travel-related messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for smarter travel options.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A light gray rectangular area at the top of the ad, possibly serving as a background.

elements.label: Central graphic shapes
elements.description: A collection of overlapping geometric shapes in the center, including circles and rectangles.

elements.label: Main text message
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Fly smarter' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: Smaller black text below the main message that reads 'Special fares today'.

elements.label: Additional graphic element
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape positioned slightly above the main text, possibly decorative.

elements.label: Lower graphic element
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'NomadLayer' in a simple font.

elements.label: Bottom call to action
elements.description: A secondary call to action text 'Shop now' located at the bottom of the ad.
